auth.checkEmailBody: Check your email — {{email}} — your access link will arrive shortly.
auth.loginSubtitle: We will send an access link to your email. No password required.
auth.errorGeneric: Could not send the link. Please check your email and try again.
auth.disclaimer: For users who have already consulted a CENPLAFAM/WOOMB certified instructor.

dayDetail.title: Day details
dayDetail.futureMessage: This day has not arrived yet. Record your observations when it does.
dayDetail.pastWarning: You are editing a past record. Changes will replace the original record.
dayDetail.describeWhatYouSeePlaceholder: E.g. flow with elastic mucus, pinkish color...
dayDetail.apiceDescription: Last day of lubricative or slippery sensation.
dayDetail.notesPlaceholder: What you observe / notes for your instructor...

linkInstructor.requestSuccess: Request sent successfully. Awaiting instructor approval.
linkInstructor.emptyStateBody: Search for your instructor by their registered email and send a request.
linkInstructor.disclaimer: Your instructor will receive a notification and must approve the connection before accessing your records.

notifications.unsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications. Consider using the app in a compatible browser (Chrome, Firefox, Edge, or Safari on iOS 16.4+).
notifications.blockedDescription: To receive notifications, go to your browser settings and allow notifications for this site.
notifications.granted: Push notifications enabled on this device
notifications.enableDescription: Enable notifications to receive recording reminders and alerts about instructor comments.
notifications.enablePrivacyNote: Notifications never contain clinical data from your cycle.
notifications.dailyReminderDesc: Receive a reminder to record your daily observations.
notifications.instructorCommentsDesc: Notify when your instructor adds a comment or review.
notifications.conflictResolutionDesc: Notify when your instructor reviews and resolves an observation.
notifications.privacyNotice: Notifications never contain clinical data from your cycle. Messages only indicate that new information is waiting for your attention in the app.
notifications.loginRequired: Log in to manage your notifications.
